summary: Iteration 64: Tested Bot Dispatch Compliance features. All 15 backend API tests pass (1 skipped due to no available serials). Backend endpoints correctly enforce compliance: prepare-dispatch returns comprehensive data with pricing/GST/compliance status, dispatch requires confirmed=true and validates invoice/label/tracking/eway-bill. Frontend bot UI working correctly - shows order details with known/missing fields, asks for missing data before dispatch.

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed, 1 skipped due to no available serials)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 tested Bot Dispatch Compliance features. Key findings: 1) GET /api/bot/prepare-dispatch/{order_id} returns comprehensive data including order details, customer info, product info, pricing with GST breakdown, logistics, documents status, serial numbers, compliance status, and missing_fields list. 2) POST /api/bot/dispatch enforces compliance: requires confirmed=true, validates invoice_url, label_url, tracking_id, and eway_bill for orders >50k. Returns 400 with detailed error list if compliance fails. 3) GET /api/bot/available-serials/{order_id} returns in-stock serials for the order's product. 4) POST /api/bot/select-serial allows selecting a serial number for dispatch. 5) Frontend bot UI shows order details with known/missing fields, asks for missing data before showing 'Prepare Dispatch' button. 6) All test orders currently missing invoice_url and label_url, so dispatch is correctly blocked.

prepare_dispatch_comprehensive_data.details: GET /api/bot/prepare-dispatch/{order_id} returns order, customer, product, pricing, logistics, documents, serial_numbers, compliance, missing_fields, ready_to_dispatch

prepare_dispatch_pricing_with_gst.details: Pricing includes unit_price_with_gst, unit_price_without_gst, gst_rate, gst_amount, quantity, total_value, source (amazon/order)

prepare_dispatch_compliance_status.details: Compliance includes tracking_id_required/provided, invoice_required/uploaded, label_required/uploaded, eway_bill_required/provided/uploaded

prepare_dispatch_available_serials.details: serial_numbers includes selected and available list

dispatch_requires_confirmed.details: POST /api/bot/dispatch fails with 400 if confirmed=false, error message includes 'Dispatch must be confirmed by accountant'

dispatch_fails_without_invoice.details: POST /api/bot/dispatch fails with 400 if invoice_url not uploaded, error message includes 'Invoice must be uploaded'

dispatch_fails_without_label.details: POST /api/bot/dispatch fails with 400 if label_url not uploaded, error message includes 'Shipping label must be uploaded'

dispatch_fails_without_tracking.details: POST /api/bot/dispatch fails with 400 if tracking_id missing

dispatch_checks_eway_bill.details: POST /api/bot/dispatch checks E-Way Bill for invoice_value > 50000

available_serials_endpoint.details: GET /api/bot/available-serials/{order_id} returns serials, count, product_name, quantity_needed

select_serial_validation.details: POST /api/bot/select-serial returns 404 for invalid order, 400 for invalid serial

bot_ui_order_search.details: Bot finds orders by ID, shows known/missing fields with checkmarks

bot_ui_missing_fields.details: Bot shows missing fields (address, state, pincode, invoice, shipping_label) and prompts for input

bot_ui_repeat_customer.details: Bot detects repeat customers and offers to use previous address
